text.title: Agent Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: The agent-patterns decision record schema. Subagent returns exactly this shape; downstream agents read it without re-deriving.

required.field: stable identifier for the task being analysed
one of: react | plan-and-execute | reflexion | escalate-to-human
{max_iterations:int, max_attempts:int, max_steps:int} — exactly the fields applicable to chosen_pattern
deterministic check, e.g. "pytest -x exits 0" or "output validates templates/result.json"
≥2 sentences citing observables: success-signal present?, subtasks enumerable?, action reversibility?
list of {pattern, reason} for the patterns not chosen
model name for the inner loop (e.g. claude-sonnet-4)
true if any tool can mutate prod state

forbidden.pattern: chosen_pattern == reflexion AND terminal_condition is non-deterministic prose
human_gate_required == false BUT any listed tool name contains "write" / "send" / "post" / "delete"
rejected_patterns list is empty (no comparison performed)
rationale does not mention success-signal availability

allowed-transformations.transformation: Clamp max_iterations to operator-supplied ceiling if request exceeds it.
Substitute actor_model with the next-cheaper tier if cost policy demands.
Promote chosen_pattern to "escalate-to-human" when none of the three patterns fits the task.

example.code: { "task_id": "T-2026-05-22-001", "chosen_pattern": "reflexion", "caps": {"max_attempts": 3, "max_iterations": 6}, "terminal_condition": "pytest tests/test_parser.py exits 0", "rationale": "Task is parser-fix with a deterministic success signal (test suite). Subtasks are not enumerable up-front because the model must discover failure modes through iteration. Action is reversible (local code edits in a feature branch).", "rejected_patterns": [ {"pattern": "react", "reason": "no built-in retry; would loop once on failed test and stop"}, {"pattern": "plan-and-execute", "reason": "subtasks unknown until model sees test output"} ], "actor_model": "claude-sonnet-4", "critic_model": "claude-haiku-4", "human_gate_required": false, "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T10:14:00Z" }

{ "task_id": "T-002", "chosen_pattern": "reflexion", "caps": {}, "terminal_condition": "agent feels confident the code is correct", "rationale": "Tries again until it works.", "rejected_patterns": [], "actor_model": "opus", "human_gate_required": false, "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T10:00:00Z" }
example.note: Violates f1 (vibes-based terminal condition), f3 (no max_iterations), f4 (no rejected patterns), f5 (no success-signal mention in rationale).

list.item: chosen_pattern is one of four enum values
caps contains the field(s) appropriate to the chosen pattern
